# Mass Effect: Andromeda — soft-tech SciFi UI

**Clawmachine-fit rating:** C

**Notes:** Low-fit: too polished, too soft, too much teal glow. Useful only as counter-example of 'clean SciFi UI we are NOT aiming for'.

**Credits / sources:** BioWare / EA, Behance (ME:A UI team), julia-singh.com, designbyadel.com.

**Use:** internal non-commercial fair-use design reference only. Do not redistribute.
